creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

FYI- I've not forgotten/ignored this. I intend to finish this up soon-ish, and introduce it as net/freerdp2. The new port will be providing libfreerdp2{,-client}.so, , libwinpr2{,-tools}.so, along with {d,x}freerdp2 and winpr2-{hash,makecert}.

Thanks,

Kyle Evans
